span.p:
gc_data_alloc: data-zone usage >= gc_threshold ?
(default 75% of 4MB block, !gc->collecting)

span.p:
gather roots:
root_slots[] + root_ranges[]
+ JIT frame slot blocks
+ extra_roots
+ conservative C-stack scan (gc_scan_stack)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MARK: gc_mark_item -> mark_stack
gc_trace_object precise per TypeId
(items[], shape chains, closure_env, VMap callback)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
COMPACT data zone: gc_compact_data
copy live buffers nursery -> tenured
rewrite owner pointers, fixup embedded numerics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SWEEP: walk all_objects
finalize dead externals (gc_finalize_dead_object)
return slots to free lists / free large / unlink bump
clear marked on survivors

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
adaptive threshold:
freed <40% -> grow 4x; <75% -> grow 2x
cap 256MB
